entity: Tim Duncan All-NBA selections = 15 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_award WHERE player_id = 1495 AND award_type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Tim Duncan's 15 All-NBA selections (8 First Team, 2 Second Team, 5 Third Team). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 15. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
